title: capsella bursa-pastoris var. gracilis
intro: Capsella bursa-pastoris var. gracilis, also known as small cress or shepherd's cress, is a variety of the common weed known as shepherd's purse, which is a member of the mustard family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and other skin irritations. The health benefits of Capsella bursa-pastoris var. gracilis include its ability to reduce blood pressure, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant, making it a useful addition to a healthy diet. Herbal preparations of Capsella bursa-pastoris var. gracilis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
